headline: Where is Microsoft’s headquarters? Inside the tech giant’s corporate campus
summary: While Apple (AAPL) may be known for its spaceship-shaped Cupertino headquarters and Amazon (AMZN) operates out of three glass-enclosed spheres in Seattle, Microsoft (MSFT) distinguishes itself with a leafy green base that leans more “futuristic college” than sterile design showpiece. headline: Review & Preview: Earnings Storm
summary: Disappointing results from IBM and ServiceNow weighed on tech stocks. Chip stocks managed to still thrive, though.

headline: VeriSign Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) reported what it called a strong start to 2026, citing record levels in its combined .com and .net domain name base and higher year-over-year revenue and earnings. headline: Nasdaq Slides. Earnings Fail to Save the Day.
summary: The Nasdaq slipped from record highs on Thursday after the first big wave of tech earnings failed to save the day.  The Dow dropped 180 points, or 0.4%.  The S&P and Nasdaq finished Wednesday at closing highs.
